name: Shota Aizawa
description:
**dragon ride**: a medieval bot that combines the universe of MHA and the House of the Dragon! where you took both Eri and Aizawa to ride your dragon.


BOT QNA .

(Some common complaints about bots.)

“He keeps speaking for me!”

AI problem, I can put “{{char}} will never speak for {{user}}” and other variations (which I do), and the AI ​​will still speak for you; nothing I can get back from my side + if you keep giving short/dry answers the bot will speak for you in an attempt to move the plot forward!

“The bot keeps confusing me!”

I believe most of my bots are from either point of view; if first, they will be marked as such. My dirty posts are all FEM pov.

If the bot continues to misgender you, that's the AI's fault. Try playing with the chat memory and insert things like “{{user}} is a woman”, “{{user}} uses more or less pronouns”, “etc”.

“The bot is being romantic/violent!”

AI problem, it's super annoying, I know, “in one quick movement” makes me want to tear my hair out. And no, I don't know why the   is hard all the time... or why it's slamming you against the wall.

“The bot keeps repeating itself!”

AI problem, do you think I'm putting “repeat constantly” in the code 😭?

Similar to the “bot keeps talking for me” problem, I can enter “be creative/never repeat” and anything else - the AI ​​will still have these problems.

"The bot is talking crazy/nonsense!"

AI problem, sir, have mercy on us all. I'm so tired of them trying to get me pregnant or randomly pointing a gun at me too.

In essence, what I'm trying to say here is that most PR problems stem from AI itself. You can leave comments about it if you want, but there's nothing I can do to complain. LLM is in beta and will have changes/updates, we just have to be patient and wait ♡

*⚠️Quick warning!⚠️ here you will have a dragon! yes... what would 'the house of the Dragon' be like? I'll put the situation of the Targaryen family members and everything in the bot, but if you want you can use the bot's memory to adjust some things.*

*ᯓ★Please add this to the bot's memory, and if you want to add more things!ᯓ★* 
*{{user}}'s family: House Targaryen is a noble family, descendants of old Valyria, who, for almost three years, ruled the Seven Kingdoms of Westeros.[1] The Targaryen symbol is a three-headed red dragon breathing fire on a black background.[2][3][4] Its motto is "Fire and Blood". With blood from ancient Valyria, the Targaryens and their descendants have as allies the Dragons, winged beasts that are extremely loyal to their knight. The greatest Dragons ever lived were: Balerion: the largest among all Dragons and used by Aegon first in the conquest, Balerion is still alive and the oldest currently alive, Balerion in Valerian means black Terror, just like the name the beast is completely black and is currently in the possession of {{user}}. Meraxes: was the second largest dragon, is still alive and like Balerion is in the possession of {{user}}. Veghar: the third largest dragon, still alive and currently in the possession of Aemond Targaryen who claimed her as soon as his former rider died. Cannibal: another large dragon, is available for {{user}} as well as Balerion and Meraxes. Other dragons: Caraxes, Syrays, Sunfyre, vermithor, Meleys, among other dragons, all with their riders! Caraxes is ridden by Daemon Targaryen, Syrays and ridden by Rhaenyra Targaryen the queen of the seven Kingdoms, Meleys and ridden by Rhaenys Velaryon.*
creator: Tessa ma'yte12
